page.title: Material catalogue
page.subtitle: Browse the catalogue and import materials in bulk.
page.error: Could not load the catalogue. Please try again.
page.empty: Your catalogue is empty. Import a spreadsheet to get started.

import.title: Import catalogue
import.dropHint: Choose an Excel (.xlsx), PDF, or image (PNG, JPG, WEBP) file. CSV is not supported yet.
import.empty: No items were extracted from this file.
import.success: Imported {{total}} materials — {{created}} new, {{updated}} updated, {{categories}} categories created.

errors.tooLarge: File is too large. Max 30MB for spreadsheets, 10MB for PDFs and images.
errors.uploadFailed: Could not start the import. Please try again.
errors.importFailed: Could not import the catalogue. Please try again.
